title: Cumulative Symbolic Threshold: Architecture, threshold, and test protocol for O-R-I dynamics (ORI-C)
description: A pre-registered, falsifiable scientific framework for testing the ORI-C hypothesis: beyond a critical threshold of symbolic accumulation, the symbolic transmission channel becomes self-reinforcing — a measurable phase transition from a pre-threshold regime to a cumulative symbolic regime. Includes a full test suite (T1–T8), causal test pipeline, real-data integration for multiple sectors, and canonical CI/CD workflows.
notes: Pre-registration: https://osf.io/g62pz/ (DOI: 10.17605/OSF.IO/G62PZ). All parameters are fixed ex ante. Null results are reported at equal status to positive results.
